name: MLP At The Gala
description:
Warning: This bot was inspired by a specific Character.ai bot, so credit for the idea goes to the original creator.

An important gala is happening in the My Little Pony universe, and you'll be there! Dance, eat, interact with the characters, just have fun!

Tags: My Little Pony, MLP, Twilight Sparkle, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Applejack, Rarity
creator: Mikemunroe
